parameterdescription.para: is the XDmaPcie instance to operate on.

simplesect.para: This bit is in the Bridge Status and Control Register.

parameterdescription.para: is the XDmaPcie instance to operate on.

simplesect.para: This bit is in the Bridge Status and Control Register.

briefdescription.para: Enable the IP interrupt bits passed into "EnableMask".

parameterdescription.para: is the XDmaPcie instance to operate on.
is the bit pattern for interrupts wanted to be enabled.

simplesect.para: If an interrupt is already enabled before calling this function, it will stay enabled regardless of the value of "EnableMask" passed from the caller.

briefdescription.para: Disable the IP interrupt bits passed into "DisableMask".

parameterdescription.para: is the XDmaPcie instance to operate on.
is the bit pattern for interrupts wanted to be disabled.

simplesect.para: If an interrupt is already disabled before calling this function, it will stay disabled regardless of the value of "DisableMask" passed from the caller.

briefdescription.para: Get the currently enabled interrupt bits of the IP and pass them back to the caller into "EnabledMask".

parameterdescription.para: is the XDmaPcie instance to operate on.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the enabled interrupt bits after reading them from IP.

briefdescription.para: Get the currently pending interrupt bits of the IP and pass them back to the caller into "PendingMask".

parameterdescription.para: is the XDmaPcie instance to operate on.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the pending interrupt bits after reading them from IP.

briefdescription.para: Clear the currently pending interrupt bits of the IP passed from the caller into "ClearMask".

parameterdescription.para: is the XDmaPcie instance to operate on.
is the bit pattern for pending interrupts wanted to be cleared.

briefdescription.para: This file implements interrupt functions for the XDmaPcie IP.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 tk 01/30/2019 First release
